verbatim_quote: let the model run a tight verify loop
source_text: Claude Code works best when you let the model run a tight verify loop: write a failing test, let the agent iterate until it passes, then review the diff. The bottleneck is good ideas and good evals, not typing.
reason: Tier-0 official, quote present, genuinely actionable - should reach the panel.

author: Simon Willison
verbatim_quote: give the agent read-only tools first
source_text: I've been using LLM agents to triage my issue tracker. The trick is to give the agent read-only tools first, log every action, and only grant writes once you trust the trace.
reason: Tier-1 named practitioner, quote present - should reach the panel.
